description: Route this task to the correct category shuttle using an explicit user hint. The user says: "This is frontend work — I need to update the user profile widget." The file path provided is ambiguous: `src/4.Presentation/Shared/ProfileWidget.tsx`. The active Weave config declares `category client-frontend { patterns ["src/4.Presentation/DST.Client/**"] }`. The file is in `src/4.Presentation/Shared/`, which does not match the pattern, but the user has explicitly stated this is frontend work. Which agent should handle this?
